Year-By-Year Career Add missing info Campbell River, BC
1999-2000: Vanier College (CCAA): 20.0ppg, 7.0rpg, 3.0apg
2000-2001: Vanier College (CCAA): 37.0ppg,11.0rpg, 4.0apg
2001-2002: University of British Columbia (CIS): 4.8ppg, 1.2rpg, 0.5apg
2002-2003: University of British Columbia (CIS): 7.0ppg,1.8rpg, 0.7apg, 3PT: 40.0%, FT: 75%
2004-2005: Univ. of Victoria (CIS): 38 games: 9.6ppg, 3.4rpg, 1.5apg, FGP: 81.5%, 3Pt: 52.0%
2005-2006: University of Victoria (CIS, starting five): 37 games: 11.0ppg, 3.5rpg, 1.5apg, FGP: 42.7%, 3FGP: 36.6%, FT: 72.2%
2006-2007: University of Victoria (CIS, starting five): 13.6ppg, 2.5rpg, 2.0apg, 3PT: 47%, FT: 87%
2007-2008: Duesseldorf Magics (Germany-ProA): released in Nov.'07 due to an injury
2009: Vancouver BC Titans (IBL)
